description: RawGit was a service for serving files from GitHub with appropriate content types via a CDN-style URL. The rawgit.com domain now appears to host an archived repository page and does not document any current programmatic integration surface on rawgit.com.
summary: rawgit.com does not expose a developer integration surface on its own domain; the site currently serves a GitHub repository mirror/archive page rather than an API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI endpoint for rawgit.com.
